ddls:
CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "museum_id" INTEGER /* Museum ID assigned by the system */,
  "museum_name" TEXT /* Name of the museum or cultural institution */,
  "legal_name" TEXT /* Legal name of the institution */,
  "alternate_name" TEXT /* Alternate name of the institution */,
  "museum_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of museum */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution (if different from the museum name) */,
  "admin_street_address" TEXT /* Street address of the administrative location */,
  "admin_city" TEXT /* City of the administrative location */,
  "admin_state" TEXT /* State of the administrative location */,
  "admin_zip_code" INTEGER /* Zip code of the administrative location */,
  "physical_street_address" TEXT /* Street address of the physical location */,
  "physical_city" TEXT /* City of the physical location */,
  "physical_state" TEXT /* State of the physical location */,
  "physical_zip_code" INTEGER /* Zip code of the physical location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the institution */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the institution's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the institution's location */,
  "locale_code" INTEGER /* Locale code (NCES) of the institution */,
  "county_code" INTEGER /* County code (FIPS) of the institution */,
  "state_code" INTEGER /* State code (FIPS) of the institution */,
  "region_code" INTEGER /* Region code (AAM) of the institution */,
  "employer_id_number" TEXT /* Employer ID number of the institution */,
  "tax_period" TEXT /* Tax period of the institution */,
  "income" REAL /* Annual income of the institution */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the institution */,
  "institution_foundation_date" TEXT /* Foundation date of the institution */,
  "institution_website" TEXT /* Official website of the institution */,
  "institution_email" TEXT /* Official email address of the institution */,
  "institution_social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the institution's social media profiles */,
  "institution_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the institution's mission and activities */,
  "institution_open_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the institution */,
  "institution_contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "institution_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  "institution_contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institutions_museum_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("museum_type_id") REFERENCES museum_types ("museum_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institutions_physical_zip_code FOREIGN KEY ("physical_zip_code") REFERENCES locations ("zip_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institutions_admin_zip_code FOREIGN KEY ("admin_zip_code") REFERENCES locations ("zip_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "museum_types" (
  "museum_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each museum type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the museum type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the museum type */,
  "type_category" TEXT /* Category to which the museum type belongs */,
  "type_description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the museum type */,
  "type_website" TEXT /* Official website for the type of museum (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("museum_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., Administrative, Physical) */,
  "street_address" TEXT /* Street address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "zip_code" INTEGER /* Zip code of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "location_country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  "location_postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the location */,
  "location_time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the location */,
  "location_area_code" TEXT /* Area code for the location's phone number */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution */,
  "income" REAL /* Annual income of the institution */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the institution */,
  "tax_period" TEXT /* Tax period of the institution */,
  "financial_year_start" TEXT /* Start date of the financial year */,
  "financial_year_end" TEXT /* End date of the financial year */,
  "financial_expenses" REAL /* Total expenses of the institution */,
  "financial_net_income" REAL /* Net income (revenue - expenses) */,
  "financial_profit_margin" REAL /* Profit margin as a percentage */,
  "financial_source" TEXT /* Source of the financial data (e.g., internal, external audit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financials_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, curator, financial officer) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* User's position or role within the department */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "user_date_of_birth" TEXT /* User's date of birth */,
  "user_hire_date" TEXT /* Date the user was hired */,
  "user_access_level" TEXT /* User's access level (e.g., read-only, full access) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the institution */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the institution was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the system (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session (in seconds) */,
  "access_activity" TEXT /* A brief description of the activities performed during the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
